rationale: Author-of-record, round 2. The fix (2b55d1a7) is exactly the consolidated-round-1 mandate's single item: adrTouchpointLinkRe becomes `\[(ADR-\d{4})([^0-9\]][^\]]*)?\]\([^)]+\)`, byte-identical to the prescribed digit-boundary form, in one commit with the mandated message, touching only spec.go + spec_test.go. architecture.md is correctly untouched — its doc-sync region cites the example link FORMS (`[ADR-0031](...)`, filename-form), not the regex literal, so no doc drift. Deviation assessment: this DOES deviate from the plan Step-2 verbatim regex, but the plan's literal text carried a latent defect against its OWN intent — `[^\]]*` swallowed a 5th digit, so `[ADR-12345]` captured group 1 = `ADR-1234` and existence-checked the wrong ADR (false 'missing ADR-1234'; `[ADR-00311]` false-passed via the ADR-0031 prefix). The fix restores fidelity to the intent (existence-only over the actually-referenced ADR): 5+-digit anchors fall cleanly outside the shape (no match/no truncation/no mis-report), both genuine four-digit forms still resolve, capture group 1 and extraction code unchanged, no new error class (not stricter than parity). R6 falsification conditions all still hold; R5 untouched. Verified green: R6 8/8, R5 3/3, validate -count=1, approve, go build, branch self-check on 110 exit 0.
findings: Deviation from plan Step-2 verbatim regex is JUSTIFIED and within-mandate. The plan's literal `\[(ADR-\d{4})[^\]]*\]\([^)]+\)` was a defect relative to the plan/spec intent (existence-only diagnostics for the referenced ADR): the greedy tail truncated a 5th digit. The correct disposition of a plan-text bug caught by the panel (G1 CCR2 + F1 advisory, convergent) is to fix it in impl with author intent as north star, not preserve buggy literal text.

Fix is minimal and parity-preserving: capture group 1 `(ADR-\d{4})` unchanged, checkADRTouchpointsExist extraction body unchanged, no new error class — 5+-digit ids simply do not match (five-digit-id-produces-no-diagnostic and five-digit-id-does-not-false-pass-via-four-digit-prefix pin both directions).

Four-digit fidelity retained: bare-ID `[ADR-0031]` matches (group 2 absent, `]` follows) and filename-form `[ADR-0031-doc-sync-gate.md]` matches (`-` satisfies `[^0-9\]]`); pinned by bare-id-anchor-existing-passes and the round-1 filename-form-anchor-existing-passes.

No regression in the author-of-record lens: R6 8 subtests PASS, R5 3 subtests PASS, `go test -count=1 ./internal/validate` ok (32.5s), ./internal/approve ok, go build ./... clean, branch-built binary passes 110's own spec (exit 0). Working-tree code matches the SHA; only an unrelated untracked spec-111 reviews dir is present (not part of this bead).
Constraints honored: one commit on bead/mindspec-fbel.2, exact message, two allowed files only, architecture.md left untouched (correct — it does not cite the regex pattern literal).
